item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately triggers the brake, recognizes the repeated pattern of creating new routes/queues for each congestion point, and prevents the gift counter from becoming another default channel. It allows only a tightly bounded one-day emergency outlet, then moves upstream to root-cause aggregation and a unified front-door routing redesign before the next day."}
